desc.Receita Bruta: Total revenue from all sales before any deductions. Source: Sales table, totalAmount field.
desc.Receita Líquida: Revenue after deducting discounts and taxes. Calculated as: Gross Revenue - Discounts - Taxes.
desc.Crescimento da Receita (%): Percentage change in revenue compared to the previous period. Positive values indicate growth.
desc.Receita Total Anual: Cumulative revenue over the configured time window (default: 12 months).
desc.Receita Operacional: Revenue from core business operations (marked as 'operational' type).
desc.Receita Não Operacional: Revenue from non-core activities (investments, asset sales, etc.).
desc.Receita Média Mensal: Average monthly revenue calculated over the time window.
desc.Receita Média por Dia Útil: Average revenue per business day in the current period.
desc.Receita por Hora Operacional: Revenue divided by operational hours (8h/business day).
desc.Receita por Cliente: Average revenue per unique customer in the period.
desc.Receita Máxima por Cliente: Highest total revenue from a single customer.
desc.Dependência de Receita de Fonte Única (%: Percentage of revenue from the largest source. High values indicate concentration risk.
desc.Receita Nova (%): Percentage of revenue from new customers (first purchase).
desc.Receita Recorrente (%): Percentage of revenue from returning/loyal customers.
desc.Receita Sazonal (Índice): Current period revenue vs. average. Values >100 indicate above-average performance.
desc.Receita Incremental por Campanha: Additional revenue attributed to marketing campaigns.
desc.Custo Fixo Total: Total fixed costs (rent, salaries, utilities) in the period. Source: Expenses table.
desc.Custo Fixo Médio Mensal: Average monthly fixed costs over the time window.
desc.Participação dos Custos Fixos (%): Fixed costs as percentage of total costs.
desc.Custo Variável Total: Total variable costs that change with production/sales volume.
desc.Custo Variável Médio por Atendimento: Average variable cost per customer service/appointment.
desc.Participação dos Custos Variáveis (%): Variable costs as percentage of total costs.
desc.Despesas Operacionais Totais: Sum of administrative, maintenance, and variable expenses.
desc.Despesas Administrativas (%): Administrative costs as percentage of total expenses.
desc.Despesas Não Recorrentes: One-time or unusual expenses not expected to repeat.
desc.Impostos Totais Pagos: Total taxes paid in the period.
desc.Custo Total: Sum of all costs and expenses in the period.
desc.Custo por Dia Útil: Average cost per business day in current month.
desc.Custo Não Planejado (%): Unplanned expenses as percentage of total. High values suggest poor forecasting.
desc.Lucro Bruto: Revenue minus variable costs (cost of goods sold). Shows production efficiency.
desc.Lucro Operacional: Gross profit minus fixed costs. Shows operational efficiency.
desc.Lucro Líquido: Final profit after all expenses and taxes. The 'bottom line'.
desc.Lucro por Cliente: Net profit divided by number of customers.
desc.Lucro por Funcionário: Net profit divided by employee count. Measures workforce productivity.
desc.Lucro por Hora Trabalhada: Net profit divided by total hours worked.
desc.Margem Bruta (%): Gross profit as percentage of revenue. Higher = better cost control.
desc.Margem Operacional (%): Operating profit as percentage of revenue.
desc.Margem Líquida (%): Net profit as percentage of revenue. Key profitability indicator.
desc.Margem de Contribuição (%): Revenue minus variable costs, as percentage. Shows contribution to fixed costs.
desc.Crescimento do Lucro (%): Percentage change in profit vs. previous period.
desc.Eficiência do Lucro (Lucro/Custo): Net profit divided by total costs. Values >1 mean profitable.
desc.Índice de Qualidade do Lucro: Recurring profit as percentage of total. Higher = more sustainable.
desc.Resultado Financeiro Final: Final financial result after all adjustments.
desc.Lucro Ajustado: Net profit minus non-recurring items. Shows sustainable profit.
desc.Fluxo de Caixa Operacional: Cash from operations (received - paid). Shows business cash generation.
desc.Fluxo de Caixa Livre: Operating cash flow minus investments. Available for distribution.
desc.Contas a Receber Vencidas: Overdue receivables past due date. Requires collection action.
desc.Prazo Médio de Recebimento (dias): Average days to receive payment from sale date.
desc.Índice de Liquidez Corrente: Current assets / current liabilities. >1 = can pay short-term debts.
desc.Índice de Solvência: Total assets / total liabilities. Shows long-term financial health.

discovery.title: Smart Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Select a table to automatically discover new KPIs.
